name: loan-amount-zero-or-negative
rationale: Broker email states loan_amount as '$0' (likely typo or placeholder); loan_application doc shows $0. F1.LA canonical-map must validate non-negative + non-zero. Expected behavior is UNDEFINED — possibilities: (a) reject deal at intake with validation error, (b) flag for broker clarification, (c) coerce to missing-source fallback. Layer 3 product-design item.
notes: Single-event sequence. Layer 3 #18 — validation taxonomy (zero/negative/very-large/non-CAD combined into one decision-item).
